creator: bdluevel@heitec.net
text:
The patch 'patch-ac' of the port graphics/gd is lacking a space
after the end of line 24. Because of this, the "patch" stage of
the build fails.

Fix: I'm afraid a diff will not show the missing space visibly; anyway,
it's after the -DHAVE_LIBTTF in the added line.
How-To-Repeat:   cd /usr/ports/graphics/gd
  make clean
  make patch
